title: CEO Of Quincy Wellness & Naturopathic Centre Felicitates Ooni Of Ife At 50 - FinancialEDGE
description: The founder of Quincy Herbals, now transformed into Quincy Wellness and Naturopathic Centre, Dr. Quincy Olasunmbo Ayodele on Thursday, October 17, 2024 felicitated with the Ooni of Ife, Imperial Majesty Oba Adeyeye Ogunwusi (the Ojaja II) CFR, on the occasion his 50th birthday anniversary. In a statement she personally signed and made available to
html: The founder of Quincy Herbals, now transformed into Quincy Wellness and Naturopathic Centre, Dr. Quincy Olasunmbo Ayodele on Thursday, October 17, 2024 felicitated with the Ooni of Ife, Imperial Majesty Oba Adeyeye Ogunwusi (the Ojaja II) CFR, on the occasion his 50th birthday anniversary.
